---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability or enhancement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

# Summary

Provide a concise description of the requested feature.

## Problem Statement

What problem are we trying to solve? Why does this matter?

## Desired Outcome

Describe the intended result in business or user terms.

## Scope

What is included in this request?

## Out of Scope

What is explicitly not included?

## Users / Stakeholders

Who benefits from this change?

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] 
- [ ] 
- [ ] 

Acceptance criteria should describe observable outcomes, not implementation details.

## UX / Workflow Notes

Describe any user workflow impact, UI implications, or experience considerations.

## Technical / Architectural Considerations

Note any expected impact on:
- APIs
- Data model
- Auth / permissions
- Integrations
- Performance
- Deployment / operations

## Risks / Dependencies

List blockers, dependencies, constraints, or notable risks.

## Validation Plan

How will success be verified?

## Related Issues / PRs / Docs

Link any related material here.
